name: premium
description: Professional masterclass environment with clean studio setup and expert authority. This mood positions GAIA Learn as the gold standard in wellness education — polished, credible, and worth investing in.

style.lighting: even professional studio | clean three-point setup | bright and trustworthy
style.color_grade: clean teal and white | minimal warm accents | professional neutrals
style.camera: clean medium portrait | precise product shot | steady professional grade
style.composition: clean background with expert | structured grid layouts | premium course mockup
style.props: professional backdrop, course materials, certification badge, clean desk, premium device mockup

copy_tone: Polished and professional with quiet confidence. Uses language that signals value — curated curriculum, industry-recognized, expert-led. Makes the investment feel worthwhile and prestigious.

music.mood: clean ambient corporate, subtle electronic, modern professional

example_prompt_fragment: A professional masterclass studio setup, clean white background with teal accent panels, expert presenter at a minimal desk with course materials neatly arranged, bright even three-point lighting, certification badges displayed, premium device showing course interface, clean professional neutral color palette, high-end corporate education photography
